content.query:
-- create calaendar view
CREATE VIEW gold.calendar
AS
SELECT 
     *
FROM 
     OPENROWSET(
       BULK 'https://externalstoragenaiya.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/AdventureWorks_Calendar/',
       FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
     )as query1


-- create customer view
CREATE VIEW gold.customer
AS
SELECT 
     *
FROM 
     OPENROWSET(
       BULK 'https://externalstoragenaiya.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/AdventureWorks_Customers/',
       FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
     )as query1

-- create product_category view
CREATE VIEW gold.pro_cat
AS
SELECT 
     *
FROM 
     OPENROWSET(
       BULK 'https://externalstoragenaiya.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/AdventureWorks_Product_Categories/',
       FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
     )as query1     

-- create product_subcategory view
CREATE VIEW gold.pro_subcat
AS
SELECT 
     *
FROM 
     OPENROWSET(
       BULK 'https://externalstoragenaiya.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/AdventureWorks_Product_Subcategories/',
       FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
     )as query1     

-- create product view
CREATE VIEW gold.product
AS
SELECT 
     *
FROM 
     OPENROWSET(
       BULK 'https://externalstoragenaiya.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/AdventureWorks_Products/',
       FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
     )as query1     

-- create returns view
CREATE VIEW gold.returns
AS
SELECT 
     *
FROM 
     OPENROWSET(
       BULK 'https://externalstoragenaiya.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/AdventureWorks_Returns/',
       FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
     )as query1    

-- create Territories view
CREATE VIEW gold.territories
AS
SELECT 
     *
FROM 
     OPENROWSET(
       BULK 'https://externalstoragenaiya.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/AdventureWorks_Territories/',
       FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
     )as query1     


-- create Sales view
CREATE VIEW gold.sales
AS
SELECT 
     *
FROM 
     OPENROWSET(
       BULK 'https://externalstoragenaiya.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/AdventureWorks_Sales_2017/',
       FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
     )as query1

CREATE MASTER KEY ENCRYPTION BY PASSWORD = ''


CREATE DATABASE SCOPED CREDENTIAL naiya_cred
WITH
   IDENTITY = 'Managed Identity'

-- Create External DataSource Silver
CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE source_silver
WITH(
    LOCATION = 'https://externalstoragenaiya.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/',
    CREDENTIAL = naiya_cred
)


-- Create External DataSource Gold
CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE source_gold
WITH(
    LOCATION = 'https://externalstoragenaiya.dfs.core.windows.net/gold/',
    CREDENTIAL = naiya_cred
)

-- Create External FileFormat
CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT format_parquet
WITH(
    FORMAT_TYPE = PARQUET,
    DATA_COMPRESSION ='org.apache.hadoop.io.compress.SnappyCodec'
)

--Create External Table
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE gold.extsales
WITH
(
    LOCATION = 'extsales',
    DATA_SOURCE = source_gold,
    FILE_FORMAT = format_parquet
)
AS
SELECT * FROM gold.sales

SELECT * FROM gold.sales
